faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Clifton, NJ?
faqs.answer: Clifton residents most frequently encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasional sac spiders. While most are harmless, some homeowners also report black widows in garages and sheds. Our technicians identify the species during inspection to determine the most effective treatment approach for your specific situation.

We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees. Most residential properties fall within this range, with larger commercial properties quoted separately.

faqs.question: Is spider control treatment safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly.
